svg.title: Wallet Service Microservice architecture diagram
svg.desc: Flowchart showing how User Registration connects through a REST API to Wallet, Transaction, PostgreSQL database, and supporting services like Swagger, test coverage, and static analysis.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about user registration')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the REST API')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about wallet management')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about transaction logging')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the PostgreSQL database')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about testing and coverage')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about static analysis tools')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Swagger API docs')
